measurement_note: Size is P, the total number of people after all births. The legal 32/128/512-person tiers add every child to the king and then query once. The Accepted adjacency-list design and an independent iterative preorder design use O(P) total time for the trace. A correct eager-cache design rebuilds the full preorder after every birth, performs O(P^2) work, completes every tier, and is rejected only by scaling.
